_meta.note: PENDING UX-1. Trivial UI words are translated. Safety/referral strings (prototype.banner, result.band.*, result.nextStep) are left in English ON PURPOSE: they must be human-reviewed by UX-1 and must never be machine-translated. A missing/unreviewed mandatory translation should fail the build, not ship.

prototype.banner: PENDING UX-1: Jaga is a research prototype. It does not diagnose or rule out TB.

result.nextStep: PENDING UX-1: This person should receive confirmatory TB evaluation regardless of this estimate.
